name: SocialPlaces
description:
What SocialPlaces Does

SocialPlaces is a customer feedback management platform that offers a host of features for online reputation management. It helps you collect, monitor, and respond to reviews across major review sites.

Source: G2

Key Features

  • Comprehensive dashboard for managing reputation and reviews in one place
  • Collect reviews from multiple sources
  • Has an intelligent AI model to respond to reviews and analyze customer sentiments
  • Offers custom widgets to share reviews on different platforms.

Pricing

Not available publicly

Pros

✅Strong AI capability that help gather deep insights into customer feedback

✅Integrates seamlessly across different channels

Cons

❌Platform is feature-heavy, making the UI overwhelming for the end user

❌Does not offer review generation campaigns to collect more reviews

❌Has no CRM or POS integration to generate reviews automatically
what_people_say:
‍

What customers say

“I enjoy social places because it brings all my reviews and ratings into one place. I don't have to keep logging into different platforms to see whats going on. Its very easy and simple to use.”

- Review collected by and hosted on G2.com

‍

“I am still not too comfortable with navigating some of the features, I think as a consumer I get overwhelmed by everything on the platform when I mainly want to use about one or two features so my brain "lazies out" if this makes sense.”

- Review collected by and hosted on G2.com
summing_up_description:
Synup is a review and reputation management platform that helps you gather and highlight authentic brand reviews across all your listings.

Your review management tool should be easy to work with and integrate seamlessly with all your review sites. If you’re a local business or agency, then a platform’s ability to improve search visibility powered by customer feedback also plays a part. Next, you should give really strong emphasis on customer service and dedicated support.‍

‍

‍
